headlines.title: Israel says troops killed armed fighters in southern Syria and Lebanon

headlines.title: Iran's Aragchi to 'discuss regional developments' with Iraqi officials

headlines.title: Bahrain condemns Iranian strikes, urges UN to hold emergency meet

headlines.title: Iran inflation nears 89% as war strains economy
headlines.snippet: Iran's inflation rate surged to 88.6 percent year-on-year in June, with the country's Statistics Centre attributing the rise to the economic strain of the recent war. Food prices more than doubled during May and June compared to the previous year.

headlines.title: Bahrain calls on residents to seek shelter after warning
headlines.snippet: Bahrain's interior ministry has activated warning sirens and urged residents to seek safety following retaliatory attacks by Iran on U.S. bases in Kuwait and Bahrain. The escalation follows recent tit-for-tat attacks related to tensions in the Strait of Hormuz.
